seo.title: Frequently Asked Questions
seo.description: Clear answers about website development, digital strategy, custom software and ongoing support.

subtitle: Clear answers
title: Key questions to make better decisions

items.q: How long does a website project take?
items.a: A focused website usually takes 2–4 weeks. Broader projects can take 6–10 weeks depending on scope.

items.q: Will my website be ready to appear in Google?
items.a: Yes. We include structure, metadata and content foundations so Google can understand your business from day one.

items.q: Can you help if we currently rely only on social media?
items.a: Yes. We build a professional website base so your business has its own reliable channel.

items.q: How do you estimate custom software projects?
items.a: We first map the process to solve, then propose phased implementation with clear priorities.

items.q: Do you provide maintenance and ongoing support?
items.a: Yes. We can support post-launch improvements, updates and security as your business evolves.

cta.subtitle: Still have questions?
cta.title: If your business needs a stronger website, this is the best place to continue
